title: DuPont to Participate at Deutsche Bank's 13th Annual Global Materials Conference
text: WILMINGTON, Del. , May 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Ed Breen, Executive Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of DuPont, and Lori Koch, Chief Financial Officer of DuPont, will participate in a fireside chat at Deutsche Bank's 13th Annual Global Materials Conference in New York on Wednesday, June 8 th from 8:15 a.m.

title: DuPont Announces Election of Kristina M. Johnson to Board of Directors

title: From Estee Lauder to Apple, big companies say China's Covid restrictions are hitting business
text: Across industries, companies say China's Covid controls are taking a toll — so much so that some executives warn of more unpredictable performance ahead.

title: DuPont's (DD) Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates in Q1
text: DuPont (DD) gains on strong demand in electronics, industrial technologies, water and construction end-markets and higher prices in Q1.

title: DuPont de Nemours, Inc. (DD) CEO Ed Breen on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: DuPont de Nemours, Inc. (NYSE:DD ) Q1 2022 Results Conference Call May 3, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Chris Mecray - VP of IR Ed Breen - Chief Executive Officer Lori Koch - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Steve Tusa - JPMorgan Scott Davis - Melius Research Jeff Sprague - Vertical Research John Walsh - Credit Suisse Chris Parkinson - Mizuho Steve Byrne - Bank of America David Begleiter - Deutsche Bank Aleksey Yefremov - KeyBanc Capital Markets John Spector - UBS Vincent Andres - Morgan Stanley Mike Sison - Wells Fargo Arun Viswanathan - RBC Capital Markets Laurence Alexander - Jefferies Operator Good morning, and welcome to the DuPont First Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. [Operator Instructions] Thank you.

title: DuPont de Nemours (DD) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: DuPont de Nemours (DD) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 22.39% and 0.74%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: DuPont profit falls on higher material costs
text: Industrial materials maker DuPont de Nemours reported a fall in first-quarter profit on Tuesday, hurt by headwinds related to raw material and logistic costs.

title: DuPont shares down 4.5% premarket after earnings beat is offset by Q2 guidance that lags consensus
text: DuPont de Nemours Inc. shares DD, -0.05% slid 4.5% in premarket trade Tuesday, after the company beat earnings estimates for the first quarter but offered second-quarter guidance that lagged consensus. The specialty materials company posted net income of $488 million, or 42 cents a share, for the quarter, down from $5.394 billion, or 64 cents a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: DuPont Reports First Quarter 2022 Results
text: 1Q22 Net Sales of $3.3 billion, increased 9%; organic sales increased 9% versus year-ago period 1Q22 GAAP Income from continuing operations of $232 million; operating EBITDA of $818 million increased 2% versus year-ago period 1Q22 GAAP EPS from continuing operations of $0.42; adjusted EPS of $0.82 increased 19% versus year-ago period $544 million of capital returned to shareholders during the quarter through share repurchases and dividends Pricing actions fully offset higher inflationary costs from raw materials, logistics and energy during the quarter WILMINGTON, Del. , May 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- DuPont (NYSE: DD) today announced financial results(1) for the first quarter of 2022.

title: DuPont Publishes 2022 Sustainability Report
text: Report details progress on sustainability strategy organized under three pillars: Innovate, Protect and Empower. Advanced strategic actions across all nine 2030 Sustainability Goals achieving significant results in three priority goals: Delivering solutions for global challenges, Acting on climate, and Accelerating diversity, equity and inclusion.
